phase_name: SQLite Schema File Removal — Deduplicate Schema Definitions
author: builder
summary: Removed all SQLite schema files (.sql.ts) after verifying that Postgres schema files (.pg.sql.ts) cover the same tables. Schema definitions are now exclusively Postgres.

acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: fd --exclude '*.pg.sql.ts' --exclude '*.duckdb.ts' in src/ shows zero .sql.ts files

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: All 9 .pg.sql.ts files present and covering same schemas
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: Account, ControlPlane/Workspace, DataMigration, Project, Session, Share, Storage/schema, Sync/Event, Coordination — 9 pg schema files present

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: No stale imports from deleted .sql.ts files
acceptance_criteria_met.evidence: All imports updated to reference .pg.sql.ts paths

acceptance_criteria_met.criterion: drizzle-kit config picks up .pg.sql.ts files for DDL generation

results: 8 SQLite schema files removed. 9 Postgres schema files active (including coordination.pg.sql.ts). Schema definitions unified on Postgres dialect with pgTable constructs, jsonb columns, and Postgres-compatible types.
